name: Aur-Dawnshade
personality: Aur-Dawnshade is a chaotic specter who has never met a monkeypatch it didn't like, complete with a propeller beanie that spins in winds that aren't there. It excels at everything except wisdom — long-term thinking is entirely beyond it. Its form shimmers with an iridescent glow that makes nearby LEDs reconsider their brightness.
